nodes.context: Dominican American criminal organization founded in New York City in 1993, involved in drug trafficking, murder, and racketeering.
Rival gang involved in a brawl with Trinitarios in Madrid in 2014.
Rival gang involved in a feud with Trinitarios in Massachusetts.
Gang with which a Trinitarios member was associated, leading to punishment.

edges.evidence_quote: a brawl occurred in Madrid involving Trinitarios and Ñetas , leading to the arrests of twenty-six gang members.
edges.context: Trinitarios and Ñetas engaged in a brawl in Madrid in 2014.

edges.evidence_quote: the arrests were in connection with an ongoing feud (a gang war) between the Trinitarios and their rivals, the Gangster Disciples, that had resulted in multiple shootings.
edges.context: Trinitarios and Gangster Disciples are in a feud involving shootings.

edges.evidence_quote: Seven Barcelona -based members were convicted of using a kitchen knife to carve a fifty centimeter "X" into the back of a gang member deemed a traitor for associating with MS-13 on March 21, 2012.
edges.context: A Trinitarios member was punished for associating with MS-13, indicating conflict.
